abilities.name: Catch the Blade
abilities.text: When an enemy model declares a (melee) action against this model, this model may drain a (soulstone). If it does so, the action suffers (-) (-) and if the action fails, the attacking model is dealt 2 damage.

abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

abilities.name: Ս Threatening Demeanor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

actions.name: Guandao
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this attack receives a raise, this model gains a Chi token.

triggers.name: Heave
triggers.text: Place the target anywhere within 3" of this model.

triggers.name: Quick Reflexes
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting a different model.

triggers.name: Aggressive Chi
triggers.text: Remove a Chi token. When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

actions.name: Searing Chi
actions.effects: Enemy models in the area between this model and the target gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Follow-Up Strike
triggers.text: Place this model in base contact with the target, then this model may declare a (melee) action.

triggers.name: Mass Hysteria
triggers.text: Move models damaged by this action up to 3".

actions.name: Flow Like Water
actions.effects: This model may move up to 3" and declare the Prepare action.

triggers.name: Healing Salve
triggers.text: This model gains a Balm token.
